mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in real activity-sensitive retail sales transmits to stronger expected corporate revenues and raises S&P 500 20-day forward returns; lower 3-month growth transmits symmetrically to weaker returns.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value was 621340 for 2021-06-01 in the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if the sign of 3-month RSAFS growth has no positive walk-forward relation to 20-day S&P 500 returns, with Rank IC below 0.03 in more than half of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses upward through a tightening threshold, equity discount rates rise faster than near-term earnings expectations, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 2.0% after being below 2.0% in the prior 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value was 0.1 for 2021-07-01 in the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if average triggered returns exceed the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll gains and unemployment declines signal broad income growth without immediate labor-market stress, lifting consumption and earnings expectations and producing positive 20-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE falls at least 0.3 percentage points over the same 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value was 146821 and UNRATE vintage value was 5.4 for 2021-07-01
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payroll-up unemployment-down condition does not outperform either single-series signal and produces nonpositive mean 20-day forward returns out of sample.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in industrial production signals weakening goods output and operating leverage pressure, which lowers expected earnings revisions and causes negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value was 100.0951 for 2021-06-01 in the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO drawdown triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 65% of cases or if the downside hit rate is no better than unconditional.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation acceleration while the policy rate remains pinned near zero reduces expected real policy support and compresses equity multiples, generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL year-over-year growth rises for 3 consecutive months while FEDFUNDS is at or below 0.25%
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value was 272.265 and FEDFUNDS vintage value was 0.1 in the 2021-07 snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPI acceleration and near-zero FEDFUNDS condition has positive average 60-day forward returns and no lower return distribution than nontriggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A large drop in housing starts signals a turn in interest-sensitive private demand and weaker future construction-linked spending, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value was 1643 for 2021-06-01 in the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside triggers are not followed by below-baseline 60-day returns or if the coefficient on HOUST 3-month growth is nonnegative in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid fall in the unemployment rate signals improving household income security and near-term risk appetite, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the following trading week.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE 3-month change crosses below -0.3 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value was 5.4 for 2021-07-01 in the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment declines have a 5-day positive return frequency below the unconditional positive frequency or a negative mean forward return.

mechanism_narrative: Retail demand growth paired with stagnant industrial production signals bottlenecks and margin pressure rather than balanced expansion, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth is positive while INDPRO 3-month growth is at or below 0%
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS and INDPRO were both available in the decision snapshot through 2021-06-01
failure_condition: Reject if the demand-up production-flat interaction does not underperform periods when both RSAFS and INDPRO rise, or if its mean 20-day forward return is positive out of sample.
